name: button-as-child
visual_summary: A button component rendered as a child element for inline actions. It is typically used in a list or a card to provide a primary or secondary call-to-action. The component can be customized with different colors and styles.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready button component with the following characteristics:

Name: button-as-child
Description: A button component rendered as a child element for inline actions. It is typically used in a list or a card to provide a primary or secondary call-to-action. The component can be customized with different colors and styles.
Style: e.g. rounded, square, flat
Interactions: 
Tags: button, inline-action, child-component

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
